text:
Wolfe (ヴォルフ, Vorufu) Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 376 was a member of Queen Unma's Royal Guard. He spied on an unknown prince on her account before being reassigned to Prince Benjamin for protection. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 373 

Appearance

Wolfe had a round face, a flat nose, and fair hair slicked backward. He wore makeup under his eyes resembling tears, and on his eyebrows, causing them to look as though they curved upwards towards his forehead. As a Royal Bodyguard, he wore a black suit and a tie.

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Following Kurapika's broadcast on the emergency channel, the First Prince orders the members of his own private army to work in shifts with Queen Unma's bodyguards to monitor other princes. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 363 Wolfe is thus removed from an unknown prince's guard and assigned to Benjamin, guarding the entrance to his room with Furykov. When he sees the Second Prince approach holding a handgun, he points his weapon at her and orders her to stop. Benjamin gives the order not to open fire against her. Suddenly, Camilla shoots Wolfe in the head, killing him. 

Wolfe is briefly mentioned by Nukuocon during Prince Benjamin and Prince Camilla's trial.
